issues.description: Trigger is 'OnPlay' but missing the optional placement action (3 Revolutionary Army cards from trash to bottom of deck). The effect has two distinct parts: (1) optional placement, (2) conditional play.

Condition checks 'HasCardOnBoard' for 'Revolutionary Army' but should check 'LeaderHasType' for 'Revolutionary Army' — the condition is 'If your Leader has the {Revolutionary Army} type', not a card on board.
Action type is 'PlayFromHand' but should be 'PlayFromTrash' (or equivalent) — the card is being played from trash, not hand.

Missing the optional placement action that allows placing up to 3 Revolutionary Army cards from trash to bottom of deck. This is the first conditional action and should be separate or structured as part of the effect chain.
